{{Infobox character
| name = Heart Sage
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Heart Sage
| abilities = attack the mind, animate an army of silver ghosts
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

''See also: [[Heart Sage Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Charity]], also known as the [[Sage of the Silver Heart]], is a powerful figure within the [[Akura clan]] and an [[Archlady]] at the peak of the [[Lord realm]]. While most individuals at her advancement level do not achieve the title of [[Sage]], she has attained this status by connecting to a greater concept of reality known as an [[Icon]]. She is characterized by her immense self-control, maintaining a calm and composed exterior even when managing intense emotions or representing her clan. Her abilities include the power to attack a target's mind, the capacity to animate an army of silver ghosts through her will, and the use of specialized [[Striker techniques]]. In combat, she has demonstrated the ability to clash her will against powerful entities like a [[Dreadgod]] and can manifest a silver heart to assist others. Despite her high status, she remains human and is capable of experiencing deep-seated emotions and physical exhaustion. She has also demonstrated craftsmanship, such as creating a goldsteel statue of [[Ekeri]].}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Heart Sage]] is choosing three Underlords from the young generation to represent [[Akura]] vassal states in the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Heart Sage]] is the uncle of [[Aunt Charity]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Heart Sage]] crafted a goldsteel statue of [[Ekeri]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Heart Sage]] lectured [[Yerin]] and [[Ruby]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Heart Sage]] can attack the mind.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Heart Sage]] can animate an army of silver ghosts.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Heart Sage]] saw that the people were gathered in the great hall.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Heart Sage]] looks like [[Mercy]]’s composed sister.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Heart Sage]] is approximately twenty years old and has purple eyes.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Heart Sage]] is a person.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
